ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT BENTLEY, HANNAH
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT BENTLEY, HANNAH

JUDGE JOHN E. MUNTER, CLERK NICOLE OLCOMENDY, REPORTER RHONDA AQUILINA. MASTER COURT CALENDAR OF JUL-29-2002 ASSIGNED TO COURT TRIAL CALENDAR ON JUL-29-2002 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 502, CHARLENE MITCHELL.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, MARGARET RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BENTLEY, HANNAH THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1701 JACKSON ST., #705, S.F., CA., LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOC NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, MARGARET AS TO DEFENDANT BENTLEY, HANNAH DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WONG, MARGARET COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-29-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

COURT TRIAL HELD - WITNESS SWORN AND EXAMINED, DOCUMENTARY EVIDENCE INTRODUCED - COURT FOUND IN FAVOR OF PLTFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT. PLAINTFF SHALL HAVE IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF 1701 JACKSON #205, SAN FRANCISCO, CA, THE LEASE IS FORFEITED. (502 JUDGE CHARLENE MITCHELL; REPORTER: JOYCE LONG #8620; CLERK: LINDA ESPY)
